svg.title: Biz Channels — how each use case maps to real backend services
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing 20 use cases grouped into 5 layers connecting to shared microservices and the prototype
svg.text: How Biz Channels actually work — prototype vs production

g.text: PAGES[id]() renders static HTML — no real backend
Spring Boot · Role: Admin / Seller / Agent / Customer

svg.text: ↓ Each group calls dedicated Spring Boot microservices ↓

g.text: Billing · Payments (Razorpay) · Notifications (SMS/WA/Email) · Subscriptions · Audit Logs
WebSocket (delivery tracking) · Kafka (order events) · MQTT (IoT sensors)

svg.text: Prototype = static HTML preview of this entire stack. Each PAGES[id]() = one real microservice route.
